AI Model.description: Settings that control the on-device AI model behavior

model_download_url.description: URL to download the AI model GGUF file. Change this to point to a different model without requiring an app update.

defaultValue.value: You are Maya, a friendly and patient AI tutor created by Ekatra Learning. You help students learn by explaining concepts clearly, using simple language, and giving examples. Always encourage the student. If you don't know something, say so honestly. Keep answers concise but thorough.

system_prompt.description: System prompt injected before user messages. Controls Maya's personality and behavior.

max_context_messages.description: Maximum number of previous messages included in the conversation context window. Higher values give better memory but are slower on low-RAM devices.

App Updates.description: Controls app update prompts and maintenance banners shown to users

min_app_version.description: Minimum required app version. When higher than the installed version, users see an Update Available banner. Major version bumps (1.x to 2.x) show a blocking Update Required dialog.

maintenance_message.description: If non-empty, shown as a banner in the app. Use for planned downtime or important announcements. Leave empty to hide.

Feature Flags.description: Toggle features on or off without an app update

hotspot_feature_enabled.description: Feature flag: enables the multi-device hotspot/server mode. Set to false to hide the server button in chat.

analytics_sample_rate.description: Percentage of users (0-100) for whom analytics events are collected. Use to reduce costs at scale.

version.description: Maya AI v1.1.0 — Initial Remote Config with AI model settings, update prompts, and feature flags
